case_title: JESSE A. HESS VS. PAMELA FRANTZ

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HESS, JESSE A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRANTZ, PAMELA $2,760.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,760.00, **** THE COURT DETERMINES THAT PLAINTIFF'S MOTORCYLE IS A TOTAL LOSS, AND THAT THE REASONABLE VALUE OF THE MOTORCYCLE IS $5,220.00. IN ADDITION THE COURT ALLOWS DAMAGES IN THE SUM OF $300.00 FOR LOSS OF USE. THE COURT ATTRIBUTES 50% COMPARABLE FAULT TO EACH PARTY. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-22-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-22-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY HESS, JESSE A. AS TO DEFENDANT FRANTZ, PAMELA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-22-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HESS, JESSE A. ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00) SERVED JAN-21-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FRANTZ, PAMELA
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT FRANTZ, PAMELA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-22-2010 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, ROOM 103)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-03-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
